title: NITCON Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 Apply Online – 100 Posts, Salary ₹55,932, Last Date 08 April
description: NITCON JE Recruitment 2026 notification released for 100 Junior Engineer posts. Check eligibility, salary ₹55,932, exam date, selection process, documents required and apply online details.
keywords: NITCON JE 2026, Junior Engineer vacancy 2026, NITCON recruitment, diploma engineer job, BTech job 2026, JE salary 55932, engineering jobs 2026
introduction: NITCON Limited ne Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 ka notification jari kiya hai jisme Civil, Electrical aur Mechanical engineering candidates ke liye 100 posts nikali gayi hain. Yeh recruitment Delhi Jal Board ke liye contract basis par hogi aur isme ₹55,932 per month fixed salary di jayegi. Yeh engineering candidates ke liye ek bahut accha opportunity hai.
recruitment-body: NITCON Limited (Government Enterprise) dwara yeh recruitment conduct ki ja rahi hai jo Delhi Jal Board (DJB), New Delhi ke liye hai.
qualification: Diploma / B.E. / B.Tech in Civil, Electrical, Mechanical (Minimum 60% Marks)
eligibility-one: Diploma holders ke liye minimum 3 years experience required hai
eligibility-two: B.E/B.Tech candidates ke liye 0-1 year experience required hai
faq-one: NITCON JE 2026 last date kya hai?
internal-link-text-five: MP Forest Guard Recruitment 2026 Online Form
work-in-job-post-answer-one: Delhi Jal Board projects par supervision aur execution karna hota hai.
work-in-job-post-answer-two: Site aur work quality check karna hota hai.
work-in-job-post-answer-three: Daily aur weekly progress report banana hota hai.
work-in-job-post-answer-four: Field staff aur engineers ke saath kaam karna hota hai.
work-in-job-post-answer-five: Work progress track karna hota hai.

title: Punjab & Sind Bank LBO Recruitment 2026 Apply Online – 1000 Vacancy, Eligibility, Salary ₹48,480–₹85,920, Last Date 20 April
description: Punjab and Sind Bank LBO Recruitment 2026 notification out for 1000 Local Bank Officer posts. Check complete details including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, exam pattern, selection process, documents required and apply online link.
keywords: Punjab Sind Bank LBO 2026, PSB LBO Recruitment 2026 apply online, bank jobs 2026, graduate bank job India, LBO vacancy 2026, banking exam notification 2026, Punjab Sind Bank recruitment
job-heading: Punjab & Sind Bank LBO Recruitment 2026 Online Form
introduction: Punjab & Sind Bank dwara Local Bank Officer (LBO) Recruitment 2026 ka official notification jari kar diya gaya hai. Yeh recruitment banking sector me career banana chahne wale candidates ke liye ek bahut hi badi opportunity hai. Is recruitment ke tahat 1000 vacancies nikali gayi hain jo Junior Management Grade Scale-I (JMGS-I) ke pad ke liye hain. Candidates jo graduate hain aur banking job ki tayari kar rahe hain, unke liye yeh ek golden chance hai jisme attractive salary, job security aur career growth ke kaafi opportunities milte hain.
recruitment-body: Punjab & Sind Bank ek reputed public sector bank hai jo Government of India ke under operate karta hai. Yeh recruitment bank ke alag-alag branches ke liye conduct ki ja rahi hai jahan selected candidates ko Local Bank Officer ke roop me appoint kiya jayega aur unhe banking operations, customer service aur financial activities handle karni hongi.
qualification: Candidate ke paas kisi bhi recognized university se graduation degree honi chahiye. Kisi specific stream ki requirement nahi hai, lekin commerce, finance ya banking background wale candidates ko advantage mil sakta hai.
job-location: All India (State Wise Posting) – Candidates ko unke selected state ke andar hi posting di jayegi jahan unhe local language ka knowledge hona zaruri hai.
job-type: Banking Government Job (Permanent Job with Promotion Benefits)
job-salary: ₹48,480 – ₹85,920 per month + allowances (DA, HRA, TA, Medical, Other Benefits)
job-total-posts: 1000 Posts (State Wise Distribution as per official notification)
exam-mode: Online Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by Interview
payment-method-one: Debit Card, Credit Card, UPI, Wallet
age-relation: OBC ke liye 3 saal aur SC/ST ke liye 5 saal ki age relaxation applicable hai as per government rules.
eligibility-one: Candidate ko graduation complete karna zaruri hai kisi bhi recognized university se.
eligibility-two: Candidate ko local language ka knowledge hona chahiye jahan se wo apply kar raha hai.
eligibility-three: Basic computer knowledge hona zaruri hai kyunki kaam digital banking se related hoga.
salary-three: Annual CTC approx ₹7–10 lakh tak ho sakta hai
banefits-1: Permanent bank job with high security
subject-1-topics: Reading comprehension, grammar, vocabulary, error detection
subject-2-topics: Basic computer operations, MS Office, internet usage
subject-3-topics: Current affairs, banking awareness, static GK
subject-4-topics: Banking terms, RBI policies, financial awareness
subject-8-topics: Bank interview questions and communication skills
subject-10-topics: Previous year papers and full length mock tests
exam-pattern-three: Each section ka separate weightage hota hai
how-to-apply-one: Sabse pehle official website par visit karein
how-to-apply-two: Apply Online link par click karein
how-to-apply-six: Application fee pay karke form submit karein
document-ten: Active Mobile Number and Email ID
faq-one: Punjab Sind Bank LBO 2026 last date kya hai?
faq-one-para: Apply karne ki last date 20 April 2026 hai.
faq-two-para: Is recruitment me total 1000 vacancies nikali gayi hain.
faq-three-para: Candidate graduate hona chahiye kisi bhi stream se.
faq-four-para: ₹48,480 se ₹85,920 tak salary milegi plus allowances.
faq-five-para: Online exam, interview aur language test ke through selection hoga.
selection-method-five: Final Merit List and Document Verification
work-in-job-post-one: Bank operations aur customer service handle karna
work-in-job-post-answer-one: Daily transactions, account management aur customer queries solve karna hota hai.
work-in-job-post-answer-two: Loan applications ko verify aur approve karne me help karni hoti hai.
work-in-job-post-answer-three: Branch ke daily operations aur staff coordination manage karna hota hai.
work-in-job-post-answer-four: Bank ke products jaise loan, insurance, account services ko promote karna hota hai.
work-in-job-post-answer-five: Bank rules follow karte hue reports aur documentation maintain karna hota hai.
